name: @felipefontoura/paperclip-adapter-hermes-gateway
description: Paperclip external adapter for the Hermes Agent — talks to Hermes over the OpenAI-compatible HTTP API server, with no CLI inside the Paperclip container.

scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run clean && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build

adapter.label: Hermes Agent (Gateway)
adapter.description: Connects Paperclip to a Hermes Agent API server (OpenAI-compatible) over HTTP. Use with @felipefontoura/paperclip-skills-bridge to expose Paperclip skills to Hermes.
